movies.original_title: Untold: The Death & Life of Lamar Odom
movies.overview: This documentary traces the life of Lamar Odom, from his rise to NBA fame and marriage to Khloé Kardashian to his near-fatal overdose in a Nevada brothel.
movies.title: Untold: The Death & Life of Lamar Odom

movies.overview: They're back! BTS gathers in LA to record their album "Arirang" in this documentary offering unprecedented access to the band as they enter a new era.
movies.title: BTS: THE RETURN

movies.overview: This eye-opening documentary follows six couples with unexplained infertility as they lower their exposure to plastics in hopes it helps them conceive.
movies.title: The Plastic Detox

movies.overview: Shirin David. Babsi. Barbara. Meet the woman behind the rap star as she balances fame, business and her identity in this intimate, emotional documentary.
movies.title: Barbara - Becoming Shirin David

movies.overview: After the weddings, the Pod Squad from 'Love Is Blind: Ohio' shares relationship statuses and receipts in this tell-all reunion special.
movies.title: Love Is Blind: The Reunion

movies.overview: With rare access and no holds barred, the acclaimed documentarian investigates a growing ultra-masculine network and its controversial influencers.
movies.title: Louis Theroux: Inside the Manosphere

movies.overview: In this emotional interview, the late actor and ALS advocate Eric Dane shared his final message for the world — knowing it would not air until his death.
movies.title: Famous Last Words: Eric Dane

movies.overview: An engaging and thought-provoking look at Lucy Letby, the former nurse serving life in prison after being convicted of the murders of seven infants and the attempted murders of seven others.
movies.title: The Investigation of Lucy Letby

movies.overview: This is the story of the “Miracle on Ice,” when the 1980 US Hockey Team beat the USSR in the Olympic semi-finals at the height of the Cold War to bring home a gold medal. Their iconic underdog story is told with never-before-seen 16mm footage and firsthand reflections from the players who were brought back to the scene of their historic victory.
movies.title: Miracle: The Boys of '80

movies.overview: A Hungarian girl dreams of conquering international men’s chess. After a 15-year battle against world champion Garry Kasparov and her domineering father, Judit Polgár revolutionizes the sport’s patriarchal culture to become one of the greatest chess prodigies in history and the greatest woman chess player of all time.
movies.title: Queen of Chess

movies.overview: No ropes. No fear. Free solo legend Alex Honnold risks it all in a high-stakes, live ascent of one of the world's tallest skyscrapers in Taipei, Taiwan.
movies.title: Skyscraper Live

movies.overview: Elizabeth Smart's harrowing abduction at 14 from her family's Utah home unfolds through her own words and never-before-seen material in this documentary.
movies.title: Kidnapped: Elizabeth Smart

movies.original_title: One Last Adventure: The Making of Stranger Things 5
movies.overview: An inside look at the years of effort and craft that went into the final installment of the Duffer Brothers' generation-defining series.
movies.title: One Last Adventure: The Making of Stranger Things 5

movies.original_title: Evil Influencer: The Jodi Hildebrandt Story
movies.overview: Unravel the case of Utah therapist Jodi Hildebrandt, whose child abuse arrest with parenting YouTuber Ruby Franke exposed a twisted tale of manipulation.
movies.title: Evil Influencer: The Jodi Hildebrandt Story

movies.overview: Told in his own words, the definitive story of Denver Broncos quarterback John Elway goes deep on his NFL dreams, heartbreaks and Super Bowl redemption.
movies.title: Elway

movies.overview: He's devoted his career to uncovering stories the powerful want buried. From My Lai to Abu Ghraib, dig into the life's work of journalist Seymour Hersh.
movies.title: Cover-Up

movies.overview: In 1975, as America faced social and political upheaval, filmmakers turned chaos into art.
movies.title: Breakdown: 1975

movies.overview: Monaco, 1999. One of the world's richest men dies in his penthouse. This documentary unpacks the mysterious murder of billionaire banker, Edmond Safra.
movies.title: Murder in Monaco

movies.overview: The story behind the Uganda-based YouTube dance sensations who have endured devastating personal loss from famine and war, and use the power of dance and song to overcome hardship.
movies.title: Masaka Kids, A Rhythm Within

movies.overview: From the immersive opening shot to the emotional final line, go behind the scenes with director Noah Baumbach, George Clooney, Adam Sandler and more.
movies.title: The Making of Jay Kelly

movies.original_title: Lali: La que le gana al tiempo
movies.overview: This documentary follows Lali in her return after four years away from the stage, showcasing the personal journey that led her to become the artist we know today.
movies.title: Lali: Time To Step Up

movies.overview: 'Tis the season! Meghan shares her favorite holiday traditions, seasonal crafts and family recipes with friends old and new in this festive special.
movies.tagline: Embracing traditions and making new ones.
movies.title: With Love, Meghan: Holiday Celebration

movies.original_title: My Next Guest with David Letterman and Adam Sandler
movies.overview: Adam Sandler invites Dave backstage on his comedy tour, then they sit down at NYU to chat about stand-up, famous roles and his beloved Stratocaster.
movies.title: My Next Guest with David Letterman and Adam Sandler

movies.overview: This special offers a rare glimpse into the Kapoors, Hindi cinema's first family, over an afternoon of conversation, nostalgia and homemade delicacies.
movies.title: Dining with the Kapoors

last_episode_to_air.name: Episode 3
last_episode_to_air.overview: After years building her case, gathering statements and facing multiple disappointments, Gabrielle reaches Manuel's trial worn down but unwavering.

tv_shows.name: The Predator of Seville
tv_shows.overview: For years, Manuel Blanco was known among international students as “Manu White”, a friendly guide who organised cheap trips across Spain. But behind that image lay a far darker story. The case came to light when several young women began to connect experiences of abuse that had previously seemed unrelated.

last_episode_to_air.name: The Limit
last_episode_to_air.overview: Political pressure and corruption delay the investigation in the case of Ariadna Fernanda. Sayuri faces a shift in her priorities and takes on a new challenge.

tv_shows.name: The Prosecutor
tv_shows.overview: This raw docuseries is about the head of the new Femicide Investigation Unit in Mexico City, a department established to stop violence against women.

last_episode_to_air.name: Endgame
last_episode_to_air.overview: The Murdoch empire's influence is unmatched. While James and Lachlan grapple for control, Rupert makes ruthless decisions to preserve his legacy.

tv_shows.name: Dynasty: The Murdochs
tv_shows.overview: Offers an unprecedented look at one the world’s most powerful families at a crossroads, as its patriarch, Rupert Murdoch, makes one last play to ensure his legacy at all costs.

last_episode_to_air.name: The Criminal Influencer
last_episode_to_air.overview: Another recent incident illuminates Dinamita Montilla's dark past, while a discovery sheds new light on Esther's case and brings her family some answers.

tv_shows.name: The TikTok Killer
tv_shows.overview: When Esther vanishes without a trace, her family is able to piece together her last movements thanks to José Jurado Montilla, a traveler who journeys across Spain sharing heartfelt videos of his trips on his TikTok account. But “Dynamite” Montilla – the last person to have been with Esther – hides a dark past

last_episode_to_air.name: Fall
last_episode_to_air.overview: Dinosaurs rule the entire planet, with T. rex as the most deadly. But as the continents split and drift, danger lurks far away in the depths of space.

tv_shows.name: The Dinosaurs
tv_shows.overview: From the first dinosaurs to the last, this epic documentary series examines their 165 million years on Earth and the forces that shaped their evolution.
tv_shows.tagline: Take an epic journey into a lost world.

last_episode_to_air.name: Nichlas
last_episode_to_air.overview: The suspect's friends are left reeling at the shocking arrest — and are forced to reassess their feelings towards the person they thought they knew.

tv_shows.name: A Friend, a Murderer
tv_shows.overview: A Danish town feared a serial criminal for eight years. When caught, Amanda, Nichlas and Kiri discovered the perpetrator was their close friend who'd committed assaults, kidnappings and murder while spending time with them.

last_episode_to_air.name: Episode 6
last_episode_to_air.overview: After a messy soft launch, Gordon's team have issues to fix — and just 12 hours till guests arrive. Can they turn up the heat when it matters the most?

tv_shows.name: Being Gordon Ramsay
tv_shows.overview: Follow Gordon Ramsay over 9 months in the lead up to his biggest restaurant venture to date: the opening of 5 culinary experiences in London's 22 Bishopsgate, the City of London's tallest building.

last_episode_to_air.name: Rooting for You
last_episode_to_air.overview: As ratings slide, the show makes drastic changes. Tyra, the judges, and the models all confront what comes next when the "ANTM" era comes to a close.

tv_shows.name: Reality Check: Inside America's Next Top Model
tv_shows.original_name: Reality Check: Inside America's Next Top Model
tv_shows.overview: What started as a glamorous launchpad for aspiring models became a pop-culture juggernaut defined by explosive drama, public meltdowns, and controversies that still fuel viral moments today.
tv_shows.tagline: The definitive documentary about America's Next Top Model.

last_episode_to_air.name: Episode 3
last_episode_to_air.overview: The top contenders face off at the Grand Prix final in Japan. With the Olympic Winter Games coming soon, who will be the favorite to win gold?

tv_shows.name: Glitter & Gold: Ice Dancing
tv_shows.overview: Delves into competitive ice dance's intense world, where deep partnerships, total dedication, and raw emotions merge in the pursuit of Olympic gold.

last_episode_to_air.name: Take That (3)
last_episode_to_air.overview: The band embark on their reunion tour without one of their original members. Can they put their past behind them - and what does their future hold?

tv_shows.name: Take That
tv_shows.overview: The story of one of the greatest boy bands in UK history. For more than 30 years, they have brought us hit after hit, 12 of which became UK number ones.

seasons.name: Limited Series
seasons.overview: From their early beginnings as five piece formed in Manchester to becoming pop superstars, relive the camaraderie, chaos, and resilience that fueled their meteoric rise, dramatic split, and one of the greatest comebacks in British music history. Told in their own words, this is the deeply personal and definitive story of Take That.

last_episode_to_air.name: The Master of Money
last_episode_to_air.overview: After life in jail and ruined relationships, it seems all the cards are stacked against Corona. Can the king hold onto his crown in the modern era?

tv_shows.name: Paparazzi King
tv_shows.overview: Explore the life and career of paparazzi king Fabrizio Corona, reflecting Italy's recent history of scandals and social change.

seasons.name: Limited Series
seasons.overview: The five-part docuseries about the tabloid life of Fabrizio Corona, a notorious criminal from Italy, sums up the absolute downfall that the country’s morals, ethics, and most importantly, mainstream media have experienced in recent years.

last_episode_to_air.name: Blink Again
last_episode_to_air.overview: Combs' accusers step forward with shocking claims of abuse, triggering a federal investigation that leads to his 2024 arrest and high-profile trial.

tv_shows.name: Sean Combs: The Reckoning
tv_shows.overview: A revealing look at Sean 'Diddy' Combs' journey from music mogul to high-profile sexual offender, featuring footage and insider accounts that expose both his groundbreaking success with Bad Boy Entertainment and the troubling shadows behind his empire.

seasons.name: Season 1
seasons.overview: A revealing look at Sean 'Diddy' Combs' journey from music mogul to high-profile sexual offender, featuring footage and insider accounts that expose both his groundbreaking success with Bad Boy Entertainment and the troubling shadows behind his empire.

tv_shows.tagline: Who is the real Sean Combs?

last_episode_to_air.name: Engineers vs Custom Go Kart Racing
last_episode_to_air.overview: CrunchLabs product designers get 24 hours to build and race their own custom go-karts incorporating engineering know-how-and the element of surprise.

tv_shows.name: Mark Rober's CrunchLabs
tv_shows.overview: At CrunchLabs, Mark Rober transforms wild ideas into reality, blending engineering and outrageous fun for science adventures you'll never forget.

last_episode_to_air.name: Endless Night
last_episode_to_air.overview: As the murder trial unfolds, the accused men speak out. Under the national spotlight, Fernando's parents and friends reflect on his legacy.

tv_shows.name: 50 Seconds: The Fernando Báez Sosa Case
tv_shows.original_name: 50 segundos: El caso Fernando Báez Sosa
tv_shows.overview: This documentary series explores the case of Fernando Báez Sosa, whose fatal beating by a group of young men was caught on video, shocking Argentina.

last_episode_to_air.name: The Few, the Proud
last_episode_to_air.overview: The USS America and USS Green Bay head to port — until global events demand a sudden change in mission. At home, several Marines consider what's ahead.

tv_shows.name: MARINES
tv_shows.overview: Follow the 31st Marine Expeditionary Unit as they conduct high-stakes combat exercises in the Pacific.

last_episode_to_air.name: Guilt
last_episode_to_air.overview: As the court nears a verdict, investigators examine Genovese's mindset, a former classmate reflects on his past — and one insider dominates the press.

tv_shows.name: Start Up, Fall Down: From Billionaire to Convict
tv_shows.overview: One of Milan's most exclusive parties takes a dark turn when a woman reports sexual assault. This documentary chronicles the investigation that followed.

last_episode_to_air.name: Amor eterno
last_episode_to_air.overview: In his last decade, financial woes and health issues didn't stop Juan Gabriel from creating music with modern collaborators like Natalia Lafourcade.

tv_shows.name: Juan Gabriel: I Must, I Can, I Will
tv_shows.original_name: Juan Gabriel: Debo, puedo y quiero
tv_shows.overview: Rare videos and exclusive interviews reveal the genius, sacrifices and duality between the public and private lives of iconic singer-songwriter Juan Gabriel.

last_episode_to_air.name: Young Turks
last_episode_to_air.overview: With Stanfa behind bars, a media-savvy Merlino takes control of the city. A risky undercover effort ensues to infiltrate his ranks and end the Philly mob.

tv_shows.name: Mob War: Philadelphia vs. the Mafia
tv_shows.original_name: Mob War: Philadelphia vs. the Mafia
tv_shows.overview: Philadelphia is the City of Brotherly Love, but in the '90s, it was a bloodbath. Two warring mob factions battle for control in this true-crime series.

last_episode_to_air.name: Episode Three: Show Day
last_episode_to_air.overview: Victoria recounts bringing her brand back from the brink. The who's who of fashion begin to arrive, but as dark clouds loom, can the show still go on?

tv_shows.name: Victoria Beckham
tv_shows.overview: Step into Victoria Beckham's London atelier, as the Spice Girl-turned-powerhouse designer opens up about her life while preparing for Paris Fashion Week.

seasons.name: Season 1
seasons.overview: Through an exclusive behind-the-scenes look at Victoria's business, access to Victoria, her family, those closest to her and her fashion journey and including never-before-seen archive, the series will tell the story of Victoria Beckham's reinvention as a Creative Director of her own brand.

last_episode_to_air.name: This House Murdered Me (2)
last_episode_to_air.overview: From burning sage to hiring paranormal investigators, April and Matt fight for the house. Can they face its horrifying history and win their home back?

tv_shows.name: True Haunting
tv_shows.overview: Paranormal encounters from the viewpoint of those who lived them are detailed through immersive reenactments and present-day interviews.

last_episode_to_air.name: Chapter Three: A Dead End
last_episode_to_air.overview: On a dark and stormy night, our heroes must rely on their survival instincts to escape the lab. Will they get back to the jungle before it's too late?

tv_shows.name: Nightmares of Nature
tv_shows.overview: Chilling tales of survival unfurl in this documentary series that captures the drama, danger and dark beauty of nature from the perspective of its prey.
tv_shows.tagline: It's only natural to be scared.

tv_shows.name: Matchroom: The Greatest Showmen
tv_shows.overview: Matchroom is home to the biggest names in sport - from snooker to darts to fishing to boxing - and is the epicentre of some of the most lucrative deals and sporting events globally. With unprecedented access to Barry Hearn, his son Eddie and the whole Matchroom team at the Essex based HQ, this documentary series will dive into the drama of the family empire that has become synonymous with British sporting culture.

seasons.name: Miniseries
seasons.overview: Follow father-son duo Barry and Eddie Hearn in their bid to take their heavyweight sports promotion company to the next level.

tv_shows.tagline: They Don't Just Steal The Show, They Own It.

last_episode_to_air.name: Episode 3
last_episode_to_air.overview: When borders are crossed, the manhunt escalates into an international pursuit. Does Dr Nandipha’s involvement run deeper than the story suggests?

tv_shows.name: Beauty and the Bester
tv_shows.overview: Did renowned Dr Nandipha get embroiled in Thabo Bester's prison break? This chilling documentary series examines the enigmatic ties that bound them.

last_episode_to_air.name: Part Deux
last_episode_to_air.overview: As "Two and a Half Men" takes off, Charlie enters a self-destructive spiral. Ex-wives Denise Richards and Brooke Mueller shed light on the saga.

tv_shows.name: aka Charlie Sheen
tv_shows.overview: Actor Charlie Sheen tells his story in this candid two-part documentary tracing his dazzling Hollywood rise, tabloid-topping fall and road to recovery.
tv_shows.tagline: This isn't a comeback. It's a revelation.
